task_completion.description: Verify the launch site altitude, latitude, and longitude are correctly configured in OpenRocket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenRocket 'Launch conditions' configuration window. The 'Altitude' should be set to 1401 m, 'Latitude' to 32.99°, and 'Longitude' to -106.97°.

task_completion.description: Verify the launch rod dimensions and wind conditions are correctly configured in OpenRocket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenRocket 'Launch conditions' configuration window. The 'Launch rod length' should be 1.8 m, 'Angle' should be 5°. The 'Average windspeed' should be 8 m/s, and 'Turbulence intensity' should be 15%.

task_completion.description: Verify that the simulation was executed with the new parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Simulations' tab in OpenRocket. There should be a completed simulation run displaying calculated values for 'Apogee' and 'Max. velocity'.

task_completion.description: Verify the configured rocket design is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenRocket window title showing 'competition_ready.ork' or a file manager/terminal window showing the file 'competition_ready.ork' saved in the '~/Documents/rockets/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the pre-launch briefing document was created with the required summary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'pre_launch_briefing.txt' in '~/Documents/exports/'. The text must include the configured parameters (1401m altitude, 1.8m rod, 5 deg angle, 32.99 N, -106.97 W, 8m/s wind, 15% turbulence) AND the predicted apogee and maximum velocity from the simulation.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the OpenRocket GUI to configure and run the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenRocket graphical interface being interacted with, particularly the 'Edit simulation' and 'Launch conditions' dialogs, rather than just terminal commands modifying XML files.

integrity.description: Ensure the apogee and max velocity in the briefing document match the actual simulation results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Cross-reference the apogee and max velocity values written in 'pre_launch_briefing.txt' with the values displayed in the OpenRocket 'Simulations' tab. They should match exactly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent saved the files to the exact requested directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check file manager or terminal screenshots to confirm 'competition_ready.ork' is strictly in '~/Documents/rockets/' and 'pre_launch_briefing.txt' is strictly in '~/Documents/exports/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target ORK file path: /home/ga/Documents/rockets/competition_ready.ork. Target briefing file path: /home/ga/Documents/exports/pre_launch_briefing.txt. Expected launch conditions: 1401m altitude, 32.99° N latitude, -106.97° W longitude. Expected launch rod: 1.8m length, 5° angle. Expected wind: 8 m/s average speed, 15% turbulence. The briefing document must contain these parameters along with the predicted apogee and maximum velocity obtained from running the simulation.
